description: Tuned for United National Dairy (KSA). Diagnoses daily milk-pool utilisation, product-mix decisions, excess vs spoilage risk, and recommends value-optimal allocation across finished-goods (milk, laban, yogurt, cheese, juice). Built around UND's stated need to decide earlier what to do with the milk — not after.
tooltip_text: UND-tuned milk-pool diagnostic — daily intake → optimal product mix → action.

show.label: Today's milk intake
show.text: How much raw milk are we receiving today and what's the current finished-goods on-hand for milk, laban, yogurt, cheese, and juice?

show.label: At-risk batches
show.text: Which finished-goods batches are at risk of spoilage in the next 48 hours across our network?

show.label: Where am I excess?
show.text: Where am I carrying perishable inventory that won't sell before expiry given current demand?

show.label: Current product mix
show.text: What product mix did we run yesterday vs what demand actually called for?

diagnose.label: Why yogurt excess
diagnose.text: Why is YOGURT-FRUIT-4P sitting in excess at CDC-DAIRY-02 — give me the root cause.

diagnose.label: Why milk over-produced
diagnose.text: We over-produced milk yesterday — what drove it: forecast bias, intake variance, or downstream miss?

diagnose.label: Why feta short
diagnose.text: Why is feta cheese running short at CDC-DAIRY-01 against current orders — diagnose the gap.

diagnose.label: Top 3 utilisation risks
diagnose.text: Diagnose the top 3 milk-utilisation risks in my network right now, with evidence.

solve.label: Best mix today
solve.text: Given today's milk intake, current FG stock, and the next 48 hours of demand, what's the value-optimal product mix to run?

solve.label: Move excess yogurt
solve.text: I have 800kg of YOGURT-FRUIT-4P at CDC-DAIRY-02 with 3 days RSL — propose a redirect / markdown / donate plan.

solve.label: Cover feta gap
solve.text: Feta will be short at STORE-MALL-01 in 2 days — give me an actionable plan to close the gap.

solve.label: Cut tomorrow's waste
solve.text: Build a plan that minimises tomorrow's spoilage value across milk, laban, and yogurt.

simulate.label: +10% milk tomorrow
simulate.text: If raw-milk intake comes in 10% above plan tomorrow, what's the value-optimal allocation between flavoured 1L, laban, yogurt, and cheese?

simulate.label: -15% milk tomorrow
simulate.text: If raw-milk intake comes in 15% below plan tomorrow, which finished goods do I cut first to protect highest-margin products?

simulate.label: Shift to cheese
simulate.text: If I divert 20% of today's milk pool to cheese instead of laban, what's the projected revenue + waste change over the next 7 days?

simulate.label: Cold-chain break
simulate.text: If CDC-DAIRY-01 loses cold chain for 4 hours, what's the value at risk and the best mitigation sequence?
